badge: The path ahead is sealed by fog
eyebrow: A Site of Grace... not yet kindled
title: This domain remains unconquered.
lead: The Tarnished labors still, forging a grander chronicle of deeds. The Erdtree's light has not yet blessed this page, but the runes are being gathered.
cta.projects: Seek the Feats of the Tarnished
status.title: State of the Crafting
status.value: The smithing stone is being applied
pillar.roadmap.title: The Golden Order of Pages
pillar.roadmap.description: A clearer path through the Lands Between is being charted, marking the true Sites of Grace, pivots and legendary encounters.
pillar.craft.title: A More Grandiose Manifestation
pillar.craft.description: The page shall rise with mightier staging, polished interactions worthy of a demigod, and mobile rendering that would make Radagon weep.
pillar.launch.title: The Fog Shall Lift Soon
pillar.launch.description: The structure nears completion. Until then, venture forth to the Feats of the Tarnished or return to the First Flame.
